message:
feat: improve store, telemetry, Google discovery, and e2e infrastructure

fcp-store/src/object_store.rs:
- Add object store tests for content-addressed storage operations,
  deduplication verification, and metadata round-trips

fcp-telemetry/src/metrics.rs:
- Add metric registration and emission tests covering counter
  increments, histogram observations, and label cardinality

fcp-google-discovery/src/lib.rs:
- Refactor Google API discovery schema normalization for cleaner
  error handling and more consistent field mapping
- Apply rustfmt reformatting

fcp-e2e/src/logging.rs:
- Add structured logging helpers for end-to-end test harness with
  JSON-formatted output and test-scoped log capture

fcp-e2e/src/subprocess.rs:
- Extend subprocess management with output capture improvements
  and timeout handling refinements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
